question: The concept of 'agile software development'
options: Iterative development with frequent delivery of working software
Testing individual components of code in isolation
Separates an application into Model, View and Controller components
Automatically deploying tested code to production

question: 'Scrum framework' uses
options: Improving code structure without changing its external behaviour
Reusable solutions to commonly occurring software design problems
Stateless, client-server architecture using standard HTTP methods
Short sprints, daily standups and a product backlog

question: The concept of 'DevOps'
options: Improving code structure without changing its external behaviour

Automatically building and testing code whenever changes are committed
